components.name: Checkout Module
components.description: Handles checkout flow creation, validation, payment processing, and completion.

components.name: Product Module
components.description: Product catalog management including pricing, benefits, and custom fields.

components.name: Subscription Module
components.description: Subscription lifecycle management with recurring billing and metered usage.

components.name: Order Module
components.description: Order processing, payment locks, and fulfillment tracking.

components.name: Customer Module
components.description: Customer identity management and profile data.

components.name: Benefit Module
components.description: Manages digital benefits: license keys, file downloads, GitHub repo access, Discord access.

components.name: Transaction Module
components.description: Financial transaction recording, payment processing, and payout management.

components.name: OAuth2 Module
components.description: OAuth2 authorization server: client management, authorization codes, tokens, and grants.

components.name: Auth Module
components.description: Authentication middleware, AuthSubject resolution, scope enforcement, and session management.

components.name: Webhook Module
components.description: Outbound webhook delivery to merchant endpoints with retry logic.

components.name: Integrations Module
components.description: Third-party integration adapters for GitHub, Stripe, Discord, and others.

components.name: Kit (Shared Library)
components.description: Shared utilities: database helpers, CORS config, JWT handling, pagination, and custom SQLAlchemy types.

components.name: Dashboard Pages
components.description: Next.js pages for the merchant dashboard including product management, analytics, and settings.

components.name: API Client
components.description: Auto-generated TypeScript client from the backend OpenAPI schema.

components.name: UI Component Library
components.description: Shared React components built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling.

relationships.description: Resolves product and pricing during checkout creation.
Grants digital benefits after order completion.
Creates renewal orders for recurring subscriptions.
Validates OAuth2 tokens during API authentication.
Communicates with Stripe for payment processing.
Communicates with GitHub for OAuth and repository management.
Uses generated client for all API calls.
Renders UI using shared component library.
